creator: datahead4@gmail.com
text:
The Amarok development team is working to externalize their last.fm libraries into liblastfm.  It is anticipated that this will become an external build dependency with the next minor Amarok rev to version 2.1.1.

The attached shell archive builds cleanly in a tinderbox on i386, but I have not linked it with any programs to see if it behaves as designed.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
